mapper.update:
UPDATE sys_user
username = #{username}, password = #{password}, nickname = #{nickname}, email = #{email}, phone = #{phone}, gender = #{gender}, avatar = #{avatar}, user_type = #{userType}, dept_id = #{deptId}, status = #{status}, login_ip = #{loginIp}, login_time = #{loginTime}, create_by = #{createBy}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime}, deleted = #{deleted}, remark = #{remark},
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE sys_user SET deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sys_user WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM sys_user WHERE username = #{username} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM sys_user WHERE email = #{email} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM sys_user WHERE phone = #{phone} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM sys_user WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM sys_user WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_user WHERE deleted = 0

SELECT * FROM sys_user
deleted = 0
AND username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{username}, '%')
AND phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{phone}, '%')
AND status = #{status}
ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_user
deleted = 0
AND username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{username}, '%')
AND phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{phone}, '%')
AND status = #{status}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_user WHERE username = #{username} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_user WHERE email = #{email} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_user WHERE phone = #{phone} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM sys_user WHERE dept_id = #{deptId} AND deleted = 0 ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT u.* FROM sys_user u INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON u.id = ur.user_id WHERE ur.role_id = #{roleId} AND u.deleted = 0 ORDER BY u.create_time DESC
SELECT role_id FROM sys_user_role WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT post_id FROM sys_user_post WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM sys_user WHERE username = #{username} AND deleted = 1
